title: U Michigan - Intra-Epidermal Fiber Density
author: Eva L. Feldman
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.563g9gn

steps.title: Sucrose Equipment
steps.instruction: Sucrose Equipment: Razor blades, embedding molds, 24 well plate Solutions: 2% zamboni’s in phosphate buffer (PB, 0.1 M, pH 7.

steps.title: 30% sucrose in PBS Procedure
steps.instruction: 30% sucrose in PBS Procedure: Fresh mouse or rat:

steps.title: Remove footpad and fix (4 hours)...
steps.instruction: Remove footpad and fix (4 hours) in 2% zamboni’s fixative for 4-6 hours.

steps.title: Place skin in 30% sucrose in 1x PBS overnight
steps.instruction: Place skin in 30% sucrose in 1x PBS overnight.

steps.title: Embed tissue in OCT using scheme below
steps.instruction: Embed tissue in OCT using scheme below.

steps.title: Cut 10-14 sections at 30um using...
steps.instruction: Cut 10-14 sections at 30um using scheme below and place into a single well of a 24 well plate.

steps.title: Follow IHC protocol using Ptroteintech rabbit anti-PGP9
steps.instruction: Follow IHC protocol using Ptroteintech rabbit anti-PGP9.5(14730-1-ap), 1:2000 followed by AlexaFluor 488 highly cross absorbed, 1:1000 (Molecular Probes). Apply coverslips with ProLong gold or platinum antifade kit with dapi (Molecular Probes)

steps.title: Block for 1-2 hours in blocking solution
steps.instruction: Block for 1-2 hours in blocking solution. 7, Primary at RT for 1 hour, then in to cold room overnight.

steps.title: Secondaty at RT for 1 hour,...
steps.instruction: Secondaty at RT for 1 hour, then in to cold room overnight.

steps.title: Coverslip using dapi gold with prolong
steps.instruction: Coverslip using dapi gold with prolong. Imaging:

steps.title: Three images per sample are collected...
steps.instruction: Three images per sample are collected on an Olympus FluoView 500 confocal microscope using a 20 X air objective at a resolution of 1024 X 1024 pixels. The optical section thicknessis3.3um. 10images per stack are flattened using MetaMorph(version7.

steps.title: arithmetic max option
steps.instruction: arithmetic max option. Data are presented as the fibers crossing the epidermal border of PGP9.5 positive fibers per area of epidermis.
